title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
